highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.2 hardens the Windows and Android native binaries and fills small API gaps on tvOS.

bullets.detail: Adds the SKSurface.Create overloads that were present on iOS but missing on tvOS.
The Android native symbols are preserved and shipped in the symbol package for better crash triage.
Enables Control Flow Guard and BufferSecurityCheck on the bundled Windows native DLLs to satisfy BinSkim BA2007 and related checks.

contributor_summaries.Aguilex: Enabled Control Flow Guard and BufferSecurityCheck on the Windows native DLLs.
contributor_summaries.MartinZikmund: Added the missing tvOS SKSurface.Create overloads.

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 collected the tvOS SKSurface fix, packed Android symbols, and improved the generator.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 enabled Control Flow Guard and BufferSecurityCheck on the Windows native DLLs.
preview_summaries.p3: Preview 3 extended the Spectre-mitigation flag to the Linux native binary and cut the release candidate.

harfbuzz_summary: Picks up the Android symbol preservation and Windows hardening flags that also cover the HarfBuzzSharp binding.
